positive: A celestial forest scene: glowing bioluminescent flora, ethereal mist weaving through massive, twisting root structures, and a central, crystalline geode formation. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic vaporwave, featuring deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and touches of magenta light. The composition must be centered, forming a strong, symmetrical vertical silhouette suitable for a chest print. The lighting should be dramatic rim lighting, emphasizing the contours of the leaves and roots against a dark, velvety void. Highly detailed, vector-like clarity, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts, minimalist yet maximalist feel.
negative: blurry, deformed, text, signature, watermark, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, artifacts, grainy, noisy, photographic, cartoon, amateur, messy background
